description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple Rust jobs, all running in the default test stage. Use the rust Docker image for the clippy, rustfmt, and test:stable jobs, rust:1.61 for the test:1.61 job, and rustlang/rust:nightly for the test:nightly job. The clippy job runs "rustc --version && cargo --version", then "rustup component add clippy-preview", and finally "cargo clippy --verbose". The rustfmt job runs "rustc --version && cargo --version", then "rustup component add rustfmt-preview", and finally "cargo fmt -- --check". The test:1.61, test:nightly, and test:stable jobs each run "rustc --version && cargo --version", then "cargo test --all --verbose", and then "cargo test --all --all-features --verbose".
